clusterDomain.description: Cluster internal domain (used to build service FQDNs). Default to 'cluster.local'

commonAffinities.description: Common affinities added to all managed resources

commonAnnotations.description: Common annotations added to all managed resources

commonExpositions.description: Common exposition settings that applies to all managed resources

gatewayRoute.description: Common Gateway route specification (such as reference name, reference namespace etc.). Default reference name is 'default'.

annotations.description: Annotations to apply to Route if created

expose.description: Whether a Gateway Route should be exposed (ie. created)

gatewayRefName.description: The parent Gateway reference name, sets the parentRefs.name property

gatewayRefNamespace.description: The parent Gateway reference namespace, sets the parentRefs.namespace property

gatewayRefSectionName.description: The parent Gateway reference section name, sets the parentRefs.sectionName property

ingress.description: Common ingress specification (such as class name, etc.)

annotations.description: Annotations to apply to Ingress if created

className.description: When exposed, sets the ingressClassName property

expose.description: Whether Ingress should be exposed (ie. created)

generateCert.description: Whether operator should generate self-signed certificate for this ingress

secretRef.description: Existing Secret holding TLS key and certificate name

type.description: Type of exposition for Microcks services. Default is 'INGRESS'.

commonLabels.description: Common labels to add to all managed resources

commonTolerations.description: Common tolerations added to all managed resources

features.description: Configuration of optional features in Microcks

aiCopilot.description: Configuration for AI Copilot related features

enabled.description: Enable/disable this feature. Default is false

implementation.description: The implementation to use for AI Copilot feature

apiKey.description: The OpenAI API key to use

apiUrl.description: The OpenAI API URL to use

maxTokens.description: The maximum number of tokens to generate/transfer

model.description: The model to use for OpenAI API calls

timeout.description: The timeout for OpenAI API calls

password.description: The password to use for authenticating to the broker

username.description: The username to use for authenticating to the broker

defaultAvroEncoding.description: Default Avro encoding mode for publishing mock messages

defaultBinding.description: Default protocol binding to use if no specified in AsyncAPI document

defaultFrequency.description: Default frequency for publishing async mock messages

enabled.description: Enable/disable this feature. Default is false

env.description: Environment variables for Async Minion component

project.description: The Google Cloud Platform (GCP) project to use for connecting to PubSub broker

authentication.description: Specification of authentication method when using external Kafka

keystoreSecretRef.description: Reference to Secret holding client private key when using MTLS

keystoreType.description: Type of keystore where to find private key when using MTLS. PKCS12 and JKS are supported

saslJaasConfig.description: Additional JAAS config for SASL_TLS authentication type

saslMechanism.description: SASL mechanism used when using SASL_TLS authentication type

truststoreSecretRef.description: Reference to Secret holding cluster certificate for TLS transport

truststoreType.description: Type of truststore where to find cluster certificate for TLS transport. PKCS12 and JKS are supported

type.description: Type of authentication method for connecting to external Kafka broker

enableKraft.description: Enable Kafka KRaft mode (no Zookeeper)? Default to true

ingressClassName.description: When exposed via ingress, sets the ingressClassName property in the Ingress resources

install.description: Install Kafka broker or reuse an existing instance? Default to true

persistent.description: Use persistent storage or ephemeral one? Default to false

resources.description: Kubernetes resource requirements for Kafka broker

confluentCompatibility.description: Whether you should use the Confluent compatibility API layer. Default to true.

credentialsSource.description: The source of credentials for authenticating the connection to Schema Registry. Defaults to USER_INFO.

url.description: The URL for accessing external Schema Registry

username.description: The username for authenticating the connection to Schema Registry
